column1: # EU Consolidated Sanctions - Local Drop-in File (Task 4)
# 1. Go to the official source: https://webgate.ec.europa.eu/fsd/fsf (Financial Sanctions Database)
# 2. Or use the nice UI the user linked: https://data.europa.eu/apps/eusanctionstracker/individuals
# 3. Download the latest "Consolidated list" as CSV (v1.0 or v1.1) or XML.
# 4. Save it here as eu_consolidated.csv (or eu_consolidated.xml)
# The code will automatically pick it up on next server restart / refresh.
# Format: The parser is tolerant and looks for name-like fields in the first few columns.
